calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Appearance: Yves Nicolas (Petitioner). Mary McCormick (Respondent). Sead Somo (Witness for Mr. Nicolas. Jessica Dutton and Iza Mariano (Witnesses for Ms. McCormick).

The Court hears testimonies and closing arguments. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court DENIED the request for restraining orders for the reasons set forth on the record.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Continued To Aug-29-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Appearance: Yves Nicolas (Petitioner). Mary McCormick (Respondent).

The Respondent stated that she did not get the notice and summons and that she needs time to respond. The Court noted that no proof of service was filed. The Request for Restraining Order was continued to August 29, 2012 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. Copy of Notice of New Hearing Date was provided to both parties in open court and no further service would be necessary. No TRO is in place.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.
